doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document’s highly specific legal assertions and attribution to HUD/Illinois AG with an untraceable “TRF-2026-IL” reference appear not to match any verifiable official institutional material.
response_turn1:

response_turn2:
